title: Saving Myself
company: books, half-remembered rituals, and an unlit candle. Since childhood, Lilly has been blamed for things going wrong: pets that disappeared, toys that broke, the uneasy silences that followed her through her family home. Over time, these stories became fact, shaping how others treated her and how she learned to understand herself.
description: Lilly - Jessamy James.Writer - Tim Stubbs Hughes.Director - Julia Stubbs.Producer - 20 South Street in association with Grey Swan. Company:20 South Street in association with Grey Swan(Website) Venues:Grania Dean Studio (Lantern Theatre @ ACT) Grania Dean Studio (Lantern Theatre @ ACT)
content_warnings: References to sexual violence, trauma, misogyny, social shaming, and coercive control
